mkstruct_idempotent.solution:
Lemma mkstruct_idempotent : forall F,
  mkstruct (mkstruct F) = mkstruct F.
Proof using.
  intros. apply functional_extensionality. intros Q.
  apply himpl_antisym.
  { unfold mkstruct. xpull. intros Q' H M.
    xchange (mkstruct_erase F Q'). xsimpl (Q' \*+ H). auto. xsimpl. }
  { applys mkstruct_erase. }
Qed.
mkstruct_idempotent.explanation: mkstruct is idempotent: the second application of mkstruct collapses into the first because mkstruct already allows consequence and frame.
